story_text: Mallow stretched languidly, his fluffy body sinking deeper into the forbidden velvet armchair as he emerged from a luxurious fourteen-hour slumber. The warmth of the sun had begun its descent across the room, casting golden rays over Mallow's marshmallow-white fur. He sighed contentedly... until he opened one lazy eye and focused on his food bowl with dawning horror.
choices: Look out the window and notice a strange tabby cat lounging on the garden fence, clearly plotting its next move.
Leap from the armchair to check if there's any chance of more cat treats in a hidden place... anywhere at all.
Give an ear-splitting meow in protest at such cruel food shortages, hoping to catch the attention of Mrs. Hawthorne.
Stare menacingly at the food bowl, willing it to magically refill itself with just the power of feline mind control. (Spoiler: It won't.)
